Index.title: Pt. Manoj ji Upadhyay
Index.subtitle: Spiritual Service Platform in Hatkeshwar, Ujjain

Gallery.title: Spiritual Works & Yagyas
Gallery.subtitle: A glimpse into the divine ceremonies and grand yagyas conducted with utmost purity and devotion.

Pujas.title: Sacred Pujas & Doshas
Pujas.subtitle: Discover the various Vedic rituals performed to bring harmony, prosperity, and spiritual awakening.

kaalSarp.name: Kaal Sarp Dosh Nivaran
kaalSarp.desc: A vital ritual performed to mitigate the malefic effects of the Kaal Sarp Dosha in one's birth chart.
kaalSarp.significance: Removes life obstacles and brings professional stability.

mangalBhat.name: Mangal Bhat Puja
mangalBhat.desc: Special puja dedicated to Lord Shiva to pacify Mangal Dosha (Mars) ensuring a blissful married life.
mangalBhat.significance: Essential for marriage prospects and resolving marital discord.

rudrabhishek.name: Maha Rudrabhishek
rudrabhishek.desc: An elaborate offering to Lord Shiva using various sacred liquids while chanting the powerful Rudrashtadhyayi.
rudrabhishek.significance: Brings peace, health, and spiritual enlightenment.
